data.information:
The American Red Cross, in coordination with local officials, has opened an emergency shelter for residents affected by the wildfire, per Echols Co EMA on Facebook.

Location:

Venture of Faith Camp
1309 GA Highway 135 S
Lake Park, GA 31636

Who Should Go:

  • Residents who have been evacuated or feel unsafe remaining in their homes.

What to Bring (if possible):

  • Medications

  • Important documents

  • Clothing and personal items

  • Bedding/pillows

  • Items for children (formula, diapers, comfort items)

Pets:

  • Pets are welcomed but they will be housed separately.

Call to confirm availability.

Flatwood Kennels and Training, located at 4365 Williams Rd, Valdosta, GA, has limited kennel space, per their Facebook page.

Georgia Department of Agriculture (GDA) is actively coordinating to support animal evacuations during this time. If you need to relocate animals, please call ahead to confirm availability before traveling to any facility.

For a comprehensive list of animal shelters, refer to GDA’s Facebook page at this link.

Call to confirm availability.

South Central Livestock, located at 146 Broad Rd, Fitzgerald, GA, can house cattle animals.

Georgia Department of Agriculture (GDA) is actively coordinating to support animal evacuations during this time. If you need to relocate animals, please call ahead to confirm availability before traveling to any facility.

For a comprehensive list of animal shelters, refer to GDA’s Facebook page at this link.

data.information:
The American Red Cross, in coordination with local officials, has opened an emergency shelter for residents affected by the wildfire, per Echols Co EMA on Facebook.

Location:

Venture of Faith Camp
1309 GA Highway 135 S
Lake Park, GA 31636

Who Should Go:

  • Residents who have been evacuated or feel unsafe remaining in their homes.

What to Bring (if possible):

  • Medications

  • Important documents

  • Clothing and personal items

  • Bedding/pillows

  • Items for children (formula, diapers, comfort items)

Pets:

  • Pets are welcomed but they will be housed separately.
Emergency Shelter Open at Unity Church of God – Gym. 1580 Sunset Blvd, Jesup, GA 31545, USA. Per Wayne County Emergency Management Facebook and Red Cross.

The American Red Cross shelter in Brunswick, located at 100 Genoa Martin Drive at the Selden Park Complex, is open for evacuees and will also be providing an air-conditioned mobile unit to house small pets (dogs/cats) in crates inside the unit. Bedding and crates can be provided. Please call 1-800-Red-Cross for more information and to communicate the unmet needs of your family or community so assistance can go where it is needed most. Per the Highway 82 Fire Information Facebook page.
A local day shelter is available at Nahunta Methodist Church. Pets are not accepted. Per the Brantley County Sheriff's Office Facebook page.
A local day shelter is available at Southside Baptist Church, per the Highway 82 Fire Information Facebook page.

child_geo_events.address: Highway 32 & Highway 301 - Open Lot on the West of Side of Highway 301
child_geo_events.name: Re-Entry Point - 32/301 Intersection

data.information:
For the Hwy 110 Corridor (110 West Residents), residents may only enter with a placard. The area remains restricted to the public and no commercial vehicles are allowed.

There is no limit on placards per home.

Placard pickup is from 6 AM to 10 PM at the following locations:

  • Satilla Grocery / Hwy 259

  • Hwy 32 & 301 (west side of 301, open lot)

To re-enter, you must show proof of residence, follow all road closures and barricades, keep children under 18 with an adult at all times, and be ready to leave again if conditions change.

Per Brantley County Sheriff's Office on Facebook.

For the Hwy 110 Corridor (110 West Residents), residents may only enter with a placard. The area remains restricted to the public and no commercial vehicles are allowed.

There is no limit on placards per home.

Placard pickup is from 6 AM to 10 PM at the following locations:

  • Satilla Grocery / Hwy 259

  • Hwy 32 & 301 (west side of 301, open lot)

To re-enter, you must show proof of residence, follow all road closures and barricades, keep children under 18 with an adult at all times, and be ready to leave again if conditions change.

Per Brantley County Sheriff's Office on Facebook.

child_geo_events.address: Brantley County Recreation Department, 3540 Baker Creek Rd, Nahunta, GA 31553, USA
child_geo_events.name: Multi-Agency Information Center

data.information:
A Multi-Agency Information Center for those affected by the Highway 82 Fire.

Representatives will include:

• Georgia Emergency Management and Homeland Security Agency (GEMA)

• Faith-based organizations

• American Red Cross

• Local school system

• Board of Commissioners representatives

• Family Connection

• And additional support partners

Location: Brantley County Recreation Complex at 3540 Baker Creek Rd., Nahunta

Time: Saturday | 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM

Per the Brantley County Sheriff's Office Facebook page.
